name: PR fetcher refuses to run for a source already fetched within the freshness window unless force flag set
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/last-fetch && printf '2026-05-13T00:00:00Z\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/last-fetch/cfpb.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/fetch.sh" --source cfpb --now 2026-05-13T01:00:00Z --freshness-window 24h 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'fresh_skip' err.txt && grep -q 'last_fetch_at=2026-05-13T00:00:00Z' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
